name: Frankfuter Bohnensuppe (Bean Soup with Frankfurter
recipeInstructions:
1. Note: Use the real Frankfurters in this recipe and not the hot dogs!
2. Soak beans overnight.
3. In a 3-quart saucepan bring beans, water and beef broth to a boil.
4. Cook for about 1 hour.
5. Add carrot and celery; continue cooking for 30 minutes.
6. In a separate frypan cook bacon until transparent.
7. Add onions; cook until golden.
8. Mash soup through a sieve or food mill.
9. Return to pan and add the bacon onion mixture, salt, pepper, and frankfurters.
10. Reheat about 5 minutes.
11. Sprinkle with chopped parsley and serve.
